title: Abu Bakr al-Razi
subtitle: The physician-chymist of Rayy and Baghdad, c. 865–925

narrative.intro: Al-Razi's Secret of Secrets replaced allegory with apparatus lists and procedure — the most operational text of early alchemy, from the hospitals of Rayy and Baghdad.
narrative.design_note: Modern Atlas: the most operational author of early alchemy — apparatus lists and procedures — deserves the plainest, most legible style.
